instruments.label: ISIF-style direct co-investment
instruments.description: Ireland Strategic Investment Fund model: Trust takes junior equity, commercial co-investors take senior.
instruments.mechanism: Trust anchors each deal as first-loss junior equity investor. Commercial partners (pension funds, insurance) take senior positions. Governance modelled on ISIF Double Bottom Line mandate.

instruments.label: EBRD Risk-Sharing Framework
instruments.description: Trust provides first-loss tranche; EBRD provides senior debt. Proven war-risk wrap.
instruments.mechanism: Trust places 20–25% first-loss into RSF tranche. EBRD senior debt fills remaining 75–80%. MIGA war-risk insurance covers political risk for both tranches.

instruments.label: EU blending facility (InvestEU-UA)
instruments.description: EU grants blended with EIB/EBRD debt. Trust acts as co-guarantor reducing risk premium by ~150bps.
instruments.mechanism: EU grant covers 15–20% of project cost as subsidy. Trust co-guarantees EIB/EBRD senior loan, cutting coupon by 150bps. Remaining equity from domestic or private sources.

instruments.label: Sovereign green bond / ABS
instruments.description: Trust corpus backs green-bond issuance secured by future availability payments and asset-backed securities.
instruments.mechanism: Trust pledges NAV as credit enhancement for sovereign green bond. Proceeds deployed into certified climate-resilient infrastructure. AUM rating upgraded by guarantee, unlocking institutional demand.
instruments.source_label: Climate Bonds Initiative / IFC Green Bond framework 2024

instruments.label: PPP availability guarantee
instruments.description: Trust provides availability payment guarantee to commercial PPP lenders. Mobilises purely private capital.
instruments.mechanism: Trust guarantees availability payments to private operator for 25–30 years. Commercial lenders fund 80–85% of capex against guaranteed revenue stream. No public capital invested directly.
